ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "grouping" TEXT /* Grouping of the country (e.g., country, region) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the commodity */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "source_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source country */,
  "dest_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination country */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between source and destination countries */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade transaction */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity traded */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_source_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_dest_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_regions" (
  "trade_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and regions */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "source_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source region */,
  "dest_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_regions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_regions_dest_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_regions_source_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_countries" (
  "trade_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and countries */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "source_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source country */,
  "dest_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_countries_source_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_countries_dest_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_countries_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_commodities" (
  "trade_commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and commodities */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_commodities_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_commodities_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_sources" (
  "trade_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and data source */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_sources_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_years" (
  "trade_data_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and year */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_data_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_years_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES trade_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_years_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the customs procedure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customs procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_procedures" (
  "trade_procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and customs procedure */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customs procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_procedures_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_procedures_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES customs_procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_transport_modes" (
  "trade_transport_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between trade data and transport mode */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_transport_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transport_modes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transport_modes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade payment */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_payments_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)
